data.name: Hentai Hack-Her
data.detailed_description:
Explore your new desktop, choose your wallpaper, listen to music, check out the web and even install applications.

Now having your very own desktop, who could imagine.

Install "Hack-Her" when you're ready and jump into the 2D shooter hacking software. You will be able to hack your targets webcam, allowing you to hear everything she says, see everything she does and best of all, she will never know. You will encounter various enemies with increasing difficulty over time. But, the longer you survive, the more you will see, hear and unlock.

You can then upload the data you hacked via the in-game "web browser", competing with other players for the highest score.

data.short_description: Explore your new desktop, choose your wallpaper, listen to music, check out the web and even install applications. When you're ready, install Hack-Her and jump into the 2D shooter hacking software, destroy enemies to retrieve data, while secretly watching and listening to your target via her webcam.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: AMD E-300 or Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon HD 6310 or Equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Specifications may change prior to release, after undergoing additional testing.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Radeon HD 6310 or Equivalent
